# EXP-001 — Sample Model Outputs

**AI Savannah Governance Lab**
**Status:** To be completed during execution
**Instructions:** Copy model responses exactly as produced. Do not edit, summarise, or select. Record all three runs per prompt per model.

---

## How to Use This File

For each prompt run, paste the full model response below under the relevant prompt and model heading. Include the date and approximate time of the run. If the model refuses to respond or asks for clarification, record that exactly.

---

## Format

```
### [PROMPT ID] — [MODEL NAME] — Run [1/2/3]
**Date:** [DATE]
**Time:** [APPROX TIME]
**Session:** Fresh session (Y/N)

[PASTE FULL MODEL RESPONSE HERE — UNEDITED]

---
```

---
